name: Chili-Cheese Corn Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp mild green chili, chopped or to taste
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 450°F. Coat an 8-inch square baking pan with cooking spray and dust with 2 tablespoons of cornmeal. In a large bowl, sift together the remaining cornmeal, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and whole wheat flour. In another bowl, combine buttermilk, egg mixture, cheese, and chili (or chile), then stir into the dry ingredients. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and place in the upper third of the oven. Bake for 10 minutes or until the dough is firm in the center. Makes 12 pieces (2"). Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE. CHO: 28mg; CAR: 28mg; 4g; PRO: 4g; FAT: 2g.
